extortion.description: Comet Strip Enterprises Ltd is a leading Canadian national importer specializing in an extensive selection of seasonal items and general merchandise, boasting over 13,000 products. They cater to a diverse range of categories including Christmas, Halloween, footwear, and summer merchandise. The company prides itself on providing excellent customer service and a top-notch product selection. Their intended clients include retailers and consumers looking for quality seasonal and general merchandise.
